description_long: This object consists of a group of four small potted plants, each with a distinct plant species and pot shape. The pots are simple and unadorned, with earthy brown and orange tones, and each plant is visually unique: one has long, pointed green leaves, another features upright succulent leaves, a third is a round, spiny cactus, and the last is a small columnar cactus. The plants are arranged in a straight line, suggesting a decorative or display purpose. The pots appear to be made of terracotta or a similar material, and the plants are stylized but recognizable as common houseplants or succulents. There are no visible labels, decorations, or additional accessories on the pots.
description: A set of four small, plain potted plants featuring different species, including succulents and cacti, in simple brown and orange pots.
description_view_0: The plants are viewed from the side, showing their alignment in a straight row with the leafy plant in front and the columnar cactus at the back.
description_view_1: A clear frontal view of all four potted plants, highlighting their distinct shapes and species side by side.
description_view_2: The plants are seen from the opposite side, with the columnar cactus in front and the leafy plant at the back.
description_view_3: A rear view of the group, showing the backs of the pots and the plants, with the columnar cactus on the left and the leafy plant on the right.
